heading: Overview
body:
In this guide, you can learn how to use the following array update
operators to modify an array embedded within a document:

- [Positional Operator](first-match-operator): `$`

- [All Positional Operator](all-match-operator): `$[]`

- [filtered positional operator](filtered-positional-operator): `$[<identifier>]`

For a list of array update operators, see [Update Operators](manual/reference/operator/update-array) in the Server
Manual documentation.
